title: paeonia corallina f. leiocarpa
intro: Paeonia corallina f. leiocarpa, commonly known as a variety of the Chinese peony, is a plant species in the Paeoniaceae family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Paeonia corallina f. leiocarpa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate menstrual cramps, and soothe digestive issues. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions to be consumed for its medicinal properties.
